title: feat: get_blocking sync adapter
description: The spec lists a sync get_blocking adapter for callers that cannot be async. The keyring crate is sync-only and currently uses spawn_blocking as an adapter. Add get_blocking(name: &str) -> Result<SecretValue, SecretError> as a provided method on SecretStore that calls tokio::task::block_in_place (or block_on with a new runtime if outside tokio). Decision needed: should this be a provided method on the trait in secretx-core (gating on a tokio dev-dep or a sync feature), or a free function in a secretx-blocking helper crate? The open question in the spec prefers a separate sync-only trait for non-async callers. Resolve this design question before implementing.
